body.title: Inference router increment 3 — register Hex as the first fully-described source
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel's builder inference runs on free local Hex, so the DS cost constraint lifts and the first real build is affordable — and Hex is the first source described richly enough for the cost-optimizing selector to pick it automatically.
body.description:
**RESHAPED (2026-06-30) under D-inference-cost-optimizing-router:** this was 'correct the billing taxonomy + static cost-rank ladder'; that static ladder is SUPERSEDED by the data-driven selector (increments 1-2). This ticket is now **increment 3 — POPULATE Hex as the first fully-described source** so a real `worker` call routes there. The static ladder collapses into just Hex's populated data: `dollars_per_unit=0` (owned-local), `time_bucket=interactive`, `difficulty_capable` per tier. GATED on T-router-selector (needs the selector to consume the descriptor data; needs the schema from T-router-data-schema).
**Confirmed Hex roster (probed/pulled 2026-06-30, sized to 32GB unified memory):** minion=`llama3.2:3b` (2GB), worker=`devstral-small-2:24b` (15GB, agentic) + `qwen2.5-coder:14b` (9GB, coder fallback), analyst=`deepseek-r1:14b` (9GB, reasoner). designer stays Claude-direct cloud (by design). 48GB `qwen3-coder-next` (won't fit) + `deepseek-v4-flash` (404s local) stay on `ollama_cloud`.
**Proposed shape:** (1) For each Hex model register a `ModelSpec(source_name='ollama', ...)` carrying the increment-1 descriptor fields: `difficulty_capable` (minion=classify, worker=code, analyst=code/reason), `dollars_per_unit=0` (owned-local), `features` (worker=tools/agentic), `time_bucket=interactive` — **MEASURED at registration (probe once), not assumed**; increment 4 (T-router-live-resource-read) keeps it live thereafter. (2) Set `INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://10.0.0.100:11434` (the local `ollama` source still points at 127.0.0.1 today). (3) DS drops `model_override` and requests the `worker` TIER (tier-not-model contract — explicit model is the current violation). (4) route() pairs rule.model_id with rule.source_name INDEPENDENTLY of the spec's source (rules_engine.py:189-191) → no model_id collision; don't rename the cloud devstral spec. (5) Reconcile the DEAD source name `local_ollama` (rules_engine.py:95-96) → `ollama` IF increment 2 hasn't already.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/models_registry.py (per-tier ollama ModelSpecs with descriptors), sources.py (ollama source = owned-local, dollars=0), devices/dicksimnel/device.py (drop model_override → worker tier), env (uu_bash_profile.sh / DS launch: INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://10.0.0.100:11434).
**Design rules:** ALL inference through the Proxy; no direct OR/Anthropic; log the source/model/bucket/dollars selection at the crossing; NO SQLite.
**Scope boundary:** populate Hex's descriptor data + point the endpoint + DS tier fix ONLY. The schema (increment 1), the selector (increment 2), and live re-measurement (increment 4) are siblings — do NOT build them here. Does NOT touch ToolLoop, the trivial fixture, or the smoke driver — those are D-ds-first-live-build-on-hex siblings T-ds-hello-build / T-ds-smoke-pytest.
**Completion criteria:** (1) each Hex model (llama3.2:3b, devstral-small-2:24b, qwen2.5-coder:14b, deepseek-r1:14b) has a ModelSpec on source `ollama` carrying {difficulty_capable, dollars_per_unit=0, features, measured time_bucket}. (2) INFERENCE_ENDPOINT points at http://10.0.0.100:11434. (3) DS requests the `worker` tier with no model_override. (4) with the increment-2 selector present, a `worker` dispatch resolves to source `ollama` @ Hex when available (dollars=0 + interactive bucket wins), and to the next-cheapest-capable source when Hex is unreachable (no hard-fail); minion + analyst likewise.
**Test plan:** red→green selection test per tier — worker/minion/analyst resolve to `ollama`@Hex when available; Hex-down → next-cheapest-capable, not hard-fail; grep `local_ollama` → 0 live refs.
body.result: Hex registered as the first fully-described owned-local source: 3 ModelSpecs on source 'ollama' (llama3.2:3b/minion, qwen2.5-coder:14b/worker, deepseek-r1:14b/analyst; $0, difficulty_capable set) + Hex worker/minion/analyst rules; devstral reused via rule. DS _TIER_CASCADE drops model_override->'' so it routes by worker tier through the selector (explicit model bypassed it -> the original cloud-pinning bug). analyst->code correction (reasoning != architecture). INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://10.0.0.100:11434 set in local profile. LIVE-VERIFIED: Hex pings True; minion/worker/analyst all route to ollama@Hex. Proven red->green @2c3d613e; 123 router tests green.
